name: readme-i18n
description: Generate localized README files for any directory

plugins.name: readme-i18n
plugins.description: 1 skill (readme-i18n). Generates README files in one or multiple languages — default set: zh · en · de · fr · ru. Asks the user to choose single vs multi-language mode, inspects the target directory, and writes naturally-written READMEs for each selected language.
